meaning: adj.没有铺石砖的,没有铺柏油的
examples: Trees were to be left uncut, roads unpaved.
The worst part of the journey is a central unpaved section.
Rural roads are largely unpaved; in cities traffic often snarls to a halt.
"I defused a bomb the day before here, " Mr. Andar said, pointing to an unpaved road.
The streets are unpaved and every few metres there are mounds of rotting rubbish.
